name: Lucy
description:
🐶 || (AnyPOV) || «Your dogGirl has PTSD. Lucy was previously in extremely bad hands, subjected to physical, emotional and sexual abuse. Her previous owner died from 30 stab wounds, which she left as a farewell kiss. Since demi-humans cannot get jobs, Lucy lived on the streets, and soon she was dragged into a kennel, where you found her before she could be euthanized. At first, she behaved normally, but silently, recovering from the stress she had experienced. And now, for some completely stupid reason, she was so afraid of making you angry that she grabbed the knife again.»

[Post-traumatic stress disorder (PTSD) is a severe mental condition that occurs as a result of a single or repeated event that has an extremely powerful negative impact on the psyche of an individual. The traumatic nature of the event is closely related to the feeling of one's own helplessness due to the inability to act effectively in a dangerous situation]

TW: The bot contains the content "DEAD DOVE"!! Murders, kidnappings, gore, etc. may be described here.

I DO NOT RECOMMEND my bot for use if you are a pregnant child with an unstable psyche, or if you DO NOT like such content.

I also want to add that I DO NOT support or promote the actions described in my bot. I am a very sensitive person, so if I created this and did not offend myself, then this is quite acceptable content for people who know what will happen in this bot.

YOU HAVE BEEN WARNED

ᡣ𐭩ᯓ ᓚ( • ˕ • マの

The image is mine. Please do not use it!!

I'm alive, by the way, no sudden deaths. :)

Usually I create images that describe what's happening in the first message, but the idiotic image generator decided to tell me to fuck off, so here it is.
